title: UC Davis - Mouse Model Creation
author: Kent Lloyd

steps_raw.instruction: Depending on the type of mutant mouse requested, a number of protocols can be used. Investigators should consult with technical assistance staff at the MMPC @ UC Davis to develop their plan for deriving a mutant mouse.
